Satoru Akita 秋田 悟

Forward-Deployed AI Engineer | Edge-Cloud Integration Specialist AIソリューションアーキテクト / エッジAIエンジニア
wwlap24@gmail.com +81-70-4157-2275 LinkedIn wwlapaki310

Summary概要

Solution-oriented AI Engineer with 7+ years of ML/AI experience and proven expertise as a Forward-Deployed Engineer at Sony Semiconductor Solutions. Specialized in edge-cloud AI system integration, enabling customers to design, deploy, and operate intelligent vision systems. Successfully led international partnerships (Raspberry Pi Foundation, Lund AB) and delivered end-to-end AI solutions from requirements gathering to production deployment.

Skillsスキル

Languages:言語: Python, C/C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, Bash
ML / AI:ML / AI: PyTorch, TensorFlow, OpenCV, MediaPipe, Computer Vision, 3D sensing
Cloud & Infrastructure:クラウド・インフラ: Azure, AWS, GCP, Docker, CI/CD, MLOps pipelines
Specialization:専門領域: Edge-Cloud hybrid systems, Distributed architecture, Data structures & algorithms
Soft Skills:ソフトスキル: Solution Scoping & Feasibility Analysis, On-site Technical Diagnostic & Requirement Engineering, Hardware-Software Integration Strategy, Technical event operations

Experience職務経歴

AI Solutions Engineer / Architect AIソリューションエンジニア / アーキテクト | Sony Semiconductor Solutions, Tokyo
Jan 2023 – Present

Edge AI Sample Applications

Edge AI サンプルアプリ開発

  • Led a 6-engineer team to develop 9 enterprise-grade Edge AI sample apps, adopted in exhibitions, national demos, and enterprise briefings.
  • Released cross-border OSS project (Raspberry AI Camera) in collaboration with Lund (Sweden) and Raspberry Pi Foundation.
  • Improved cloud integration reliability via REST API–based sample apps with Midokura (Spain).

Edge–Cloud AI Deployment

エッジ–クラウドAI展開

  • Led software implementation of distributed AI systems, coordinating 5 engineers and 5 cross-functional members (sales, electrical, client support).
  • Deployed multi-camera edge–cloud AI systems (10+ cameras per site) adapting to bandwidth, device compute limits, and environmental constraints.
  • Delivered AI solutions: vehicle license plate recognition, digital signage impact measurement, shelf vacancy detection, and in-store traffic heatmap visualization.
  • Enabled enterprise AI engagements across 8+ major clients (logistics, retail, mobility).

Generative AI & Engineering Productivity

生成AI・開発生産性

  • Led development of internal generative AI MCP server, building prototypes, demos, and a 5-engineer team to release production-ready OSS code.
  • Reduced API migration workload by 80% (V1→V2) using LLM-assisted automation scripts.
Edge AI Embedded Engineer エッジAI組込みエンジニア | Sony Semiconductor Solutions, Tokyo
Jan 2020 – Dec 2022
  • Developed SDK and first-generation Edge AI demos for Sony's IMX500, supporting enterprise evaluation and adoption.
  • Served as technical lead for 2 exhibition implementations, overseeing system deployment, live operation, and on-site client briefings.
Computer Vision / ML Engineer コンピュータビジョン / MLエンジニア | Sony Semiconductor Solutions, Tokyo
Apr 2019 – Dec 2019
  • Pioneered internal ToF ML use case, independently building 46-class sign language recognition system (98% accuracy, 15 FPS); designed depth + facial landmark fusion pipeline from data collection to deployment.
  • Led ML development for ToF + RGB 3D pose estimation system showcased at CES.

Awards & Publications受賞・論文

SecHack365 (2019)
NICT-sponsored 1-year security hackathon program. Built Fasttext AI to visualize emotional transitions from Twitter posts. Selected for SXSW (Austin) and won an award at the on-site hackathon.NICT主催の1年間セキュリティハッカソンプログラム。FasttextでTwitter投稿の感情遷移を可視化するAIを構築。SXSW（オースティン）に選出、現地ハッカソンで受賞。
